---
title: "Teaching"
output: html_document
---

## Current

#### University of Florida (Fall 2022 - *present*)

* Entomology

## Recent

#### University of Alabama (Spring 2020 - Summer 2022)

```{r, echo=FALSE, out.width = "500px", fig.align='center', dpi=100}
knitr::include_graphics("images/BSC_teaching.jpeg")
```

* General Biology I & II
* Ecology Lab
